commands.proof_setup_question: What is the best way to show the impact of this CLI command?
commands.proof_setup_answer: Start with the Warp terminal visible, then set a non-current theme (Adeberry) so a background/color change can be seen.
commands.expected_result: Warp switches current theme to Adeberry.

visual_inspection.computer_vision_method: X11 root screenshot capture plus average RGB comparison; screenshots are paired with rendered terminal transcript because no graphical terminal/window manager/screenshot utilities are installed.

visual_inspection.computer_vision_method: X11 root screenshot capture plus average RGB comparison; screenshots are paired with rendered terminal transcript because no graphical terminal/window manager/screenshot utilities are installed.

blockers: Live combined staggered terminal+Warp screenshots were not feasible in the sandbox because no graphical terminal emulator, window manager, or screenshot utilities are installed; terminal transcripts were rendered to PNG and paired with X11 root-window UI captures where possible.

visual_inspection_failures_or_blockers.observed: No UI mutation captured for read-only command.

diagnostic_notes: keybinding list includes copy-related names such as terminal:copy, but not an exact binding name copy; the required command keybinding get copy returned missing_target.
